packs.name: baseline-linux
packs.description: Baseline Linux posture checks for suspicious filesystem and process state.

queries.name: World-writable sensitive paths
queries.sql: SELECT path, mode FROM file WHERE path IN ('/tmp', '/var/tmp', '/dev/shm');

packs.name: baseline-windows
packs.description: Baseline Windows posture checks for suspicious services and startup entries.

queries.name: Unexpected services
queries.sql: SELECT name, path, start_type FROM services WHERE start_type = 'AUTO_START';

packs.name: container-oke-host
packs.description: Container and OKE host checks for namespace escape and privileged runtime abuse.

queries.name: Host namespace entry processes
queries.sql: SELECT pid, cmdline FROM processes WHERE cmdline LIKE '%nsenter%' OR cmdline LIKE '%hostPID%';

packs.name: malware-triage
packs.description: Malware triage checks for suspicious binaries, hashes, persistence, and active connections.

queries.name: Recent suspicious processes
queries.sql: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline FROM processes WHERE cmdline LIKE '%/tmp/%' OR cmdline LIKE '%powershell%';

packs.name: network-exposure
packs.description: Network exposure checks for unexpected listeners and suspicious sockets.

queries.name: Unexpected listeners
queries.sql: SELECT pid, port, protocol, address FROM listening_ports WHERE port NOT IN (22, 80, 443);

packs.name: persistence
packs.description: Persistence checks across cron, services, launch points, and shell profiles.

queries.name: Suspicious cron entries
queries.sql: SELECT command, path FROM crontab WHERE command LIKE '%curl%' OR command LIKE '%wget%';

packs.name: privilege-escalation
packs.description: Privilege escalation checks for sudoers, token abuse, and elevated service state.

queries.name: NOPASSWD sudoers entries
queries.sql: SELECT path, line FROM file_lines WHERE path LIKE '/etc/sudoers%' AND line LIKE '%NOPASSWD%';

packs.name: web-server-compromise
packs.description: Web server compromise checks for webshells, suspicious child processes, and modified content roots.

queries.name: Webshell-like files
queries.sql: SELECT path, filename FROM file WHERE directory IN ('/var/www/html', '/usr/share/nginx/html') AND filename LIKE '%.php';
